description_long: This object is a long, straight sword with a double-edged blade that tapers to a pointed tip. The blade appears to be made of a dark, metallic material and is uniform in width along most of its length. The crossguard is simple and slightly curved, providing protection for the hand, and the handle is cylindrical with a rounded pommel at the end. The entire sword, including the blade, guard, and handle, is finished in a consistent dark color, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative elements on any part of the sword. The design is utilitarian, suggesting it is intended for practical use rather than ceremonial display.
description: A long, straight, double-edged sword with a dark metallic finish, simple crossguard, and cylindrical handle with a rounded pommel. The design is sleek and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight, double-edged blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and the handle's profile.
